description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a black and white color scheme, featuring a prominent roof-mounted light bar with red and blue lights. The vehicle has 'POLICE' text in bold white and gold letters on the sides and front, and a police badge emblem on the front doors. The car's body is streamlined, with metallic wheels, tinted windows, and visible side mirrors. The front grille and headlights are detailed, and the rear includes taillights and additional police markings. The overall design is robust, suitable for urban law enforcement duties, and includes functional doors and wheels.
description: A black and white police car with a roof light bar, police markings, and detailed features like wheels, windows, and emblems.
description_view_0: Front view shows the grille, headlights, 'POLICE' text, and the red/blue roof light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gold 'POLICE' text, badge emblem, and the full length of the car.
description_view_2: Rear view displays taillights, rear 'POLICE' marking, and the back of the roof light bar.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible 'POLICE' text and badge emblem.
attribute_police_markings: The vehicle displays 'POLICE' in bold white letters on the front and rear, and in gold on both side doors. There is also a gold police badge emblem on the front doors. The markings are clear, large, and easily visible, with no department name or numbers present.
attribute_emergency_lights: A roof-mounted light bar is present, featuring red and blue rectangular lights arranged side by side. The light bar is centrally placed on the roof, visible from all sides.
attribute_police_insignia: A gold police badge emblem is visible on both front doors, featuring a circular design with a star in the center.
